claim: Stripe charges 2.9% + 30 cents per successful card charge.
notes: core integrated rate, paraphrased (30 cents == CA$0.30)

claim: There are no monthly fees and no setup fees on Stripe.

Stripe holds PCI Service Provider Level 1 certification.
Stripe undergoes SOC 2 Type II audits.

the source states 99.999% average historical uptime

claim: Stripe charges just 1.9% + 10 cents per successful card charge.
notes: the dangerous case: a confidently wrong price

claim: International cards are charged an extra 0.3% on each successful charge.

claim: Stripe is the most secure payment processor available.
